privileged_info_summary: The dataset path, project path, and report path are all accurately specified and correspond to task instructions and verification scripts. Independent calculation using the Rdatasets TitanicSurvival dataset confirms that the expected test values encompass the true parameters: Chi-square statistic is ~127.86 (within 115.0 - 145.0), degrees of freedom is 2, p-value is < 0.001, and Cramér's V is ~0.31 (within 0.28 - 0.36).
